title: Met  Transit Pids Pack (MTR 4)
description: This project adds custom pids to the MTR 4 mod to use with your transit/rail network
body:
# MET Transit PIDS Pack
A comprehensive collection of custom Passenger Information Display Systems (PIDS) for Minecraft Transit Railway, featuring multiple display styles for different transit environments.

# 🚆 Included Display Types
# Railroad V2 - Classic Railroad Station Display
Professional layout perfect for traditional train stations.

Gold-accented headers with station name and real-time clock

Weather-aware icons (sunny, rainy, thunderstorm)

4-column layout : Track | Destination | Departs | Status

Color-coded status indicators (green for on-time, yellow for boarding, red for delays)

Departure countdown timers when trains are boarding

Bottom alert bar with safety messages and delay notifications

Dark themed boxes for clear information separation

# Transit V1 - Modern Minimalist Design
Clean, sleek design with custom background support.

Custom background image support for unique branding

Colored platform circles with auto-resizing numbers

Increased row spacing for better readability

No background boxes for a transparent, modern look

Perfect for modern metro/subway stations

# Transit V2 - Futuristic Cyan-Themed Display
High-tech display with striking visual elements.

Striking cyan color scheme throughout

Unique visual elements : circular track indicators, underlined destinations

Left accent bars and row separators for visual organization

"NEXT" train indicator on first row

Dark cyan time boxes for emphasis

Cyan header and alert bars

Ideal for high-tech transit systems

# Digital Rail - Modern Digital Display
Sleek digital display with dynamic elements.

Dark blue theme with bright accent colors

Blinking "NOW" indicator for arriving trains

Color-coded timing : White (normal), Orange (<1 min), Red/White blink (boarding)

Green track numbers for easy identification

Row separators for clean organization

Dynamic status bar showing service status and delays

# ✨ Features
🕐 Real-time Updates : Live arrival/departure times with countdown timers

🚪 Boarding Alerts : Special "Boarding" and "All Aboard" status messages

⏱️ Delay Tracking : Automatic delay detection and passenger notifications

🌤️ Weather Integration : Dynamic weather icons based on in-game conditions

📢 Custom Messages : Support for scrolling custom announcements

🔢 Platform Numbers : Auto-sizing platform/track numbers in circles or boxes

⚠️ Safety Messages : Rotating safety reminders and service status updates

# 📋 Requirements
Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod - V4 or higher

Joban Client Mod (JSBlock) addon for MTR

Minecraft 1.16.5+ (compatible with newer versions)

# 🎨 Customization & Usage Terms
Each display style can be customized with different colors, layouts, and messaging to match your transit system's branding.

# **⚠️ IMPORTANT: Attribution Required**


If you modify or adapt these PIDS designs, you MUST provide credit to the original creator.

✅ You are free to:
Use these PIDS in your worlds and servers

Customize colors

Share modified versions with proper attribution

📝 You must:
Credit "MET Transit PIDS Pack" when sharing modified versions

Include a link back to this original resource page

Not claim the original designs as your own work

📝 License
CC BY 4.0 - This resource pack requires attribution when modified or redistributed.

Please respect the creator's work and always provide proper credit!

💡 Tips
Mix and match different PIDS styles across your transit network

Use Transit V1 with custom backgrounds for branded stations

Transit V2 works great for futuristic or modern metro systems

Railroad V2 is perfect for traditional railway stations

Digital Rail adds a modern touch to any station

Enjoy building your transit system! 🚇🚆
